response.justification: Strong individual contributor with 13+ years of software development across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems, plus solid testing/TDD background and some developer-tooling exposure (CI/CD, test runners, MCP code generators). However, the resume shows no formal people-management experience — no direct reports, no performance reviews, no 1:1s — which is the core of this Engineering Manager role. Mobile-platform depth and large-scale build/test infrastructure experience are also limited.
strengths: 13+ years of polyglot engineering with strong testing/TDD discipline
Has built developer tooling: test runners (Trial), assertion libraries, CI setup, MCP code generators
Teaching/workshop track record suggests mentoring aptitude (Selenium course, Refactoring Dojos, Web Internals)
concerns: No demonstrated people-management experience (no direct reports, no team-lead title with headcount responsibility)
Limited mobile-platform ecosystem depth — some iOS/Apple TV work in 2015-16, nothing recent at scale
No evidence of leading organizational change or owning a mid-term technical roadmap for a team

key_factors.factor: Thin mobile-platform and large-scale build-system exposure
